ritual.neovitae.simple_dungeon.info: One-shot rite: consumes a large EV pool and assembles a complete Starter tier dungeon structure at the master ritual stone.
ritual.neovitae.speed.desc: Propels non-sneaking entities in the master stone's facing direction. Sneak inside the area to receive Speed II for 30 minutes instead. Aspects modulate velocity, target filtering, and add Soft Fall.
ritual.neovitae.speed.info: Propels non-sneaking entities in the master stone's facing direction. Sneak inside the area to receive Speed II for 30 minutes instead. Aspects modulate velocity, target filtering, and add Soft Fall.
ritual.neovitae.sphere.desc: Scoops the ellipsoidal volume of terrain below the master stone and lifts it upward into a floating moon. Foundation block beneath the master sets the size: iron 41, gold 49, diamond 57, netherite 65 across, anything else 33. 10 EV per block moved; ~100 checks per refresh.
ritual.neovitae.sphere.info: Scoops the ellipsoidal volume of terrain below the master stone and lifts it upward into a floating moon. Foundation block beneath the master sets the size: iron 41, gold 49, diamond 57, netherite 65 across, anything else 33. 10 EV per block moved; ~100 checks per refresh.
ritual.neovitae.standard_dungeon.desc: Opens a permanent gateway to the Endless tier dungeon: a vast procedural dungeon (Mines, Foreman fight, aspected loot) that goes on forever and can be returned to as often as you like. Consumes a very large EV pool.
ritual.neovitae.standard_dungeon.info: Opens a permanent gateway to the Endless tier dungeon: a vast procedural dungeon (Mines, Foreman fight, aspected loot) that goes on forever and can be returned to as often as you like. Consumes a very large EV pool.
ritual.neovitae.structure.invalid: Ritual structure is incomplete or invalid.
ritual.neovitae.suppression.desc: Replaces fluid source blocks in range with air, restoring them when the ritual stops.
ritual.neovitae.suppression.info: Replaces fluid source blocks in range with air, restoring them when the ritual stops.
ritual.neovitae.torment_nexus.desc: Binds every spawner and trial spawner in range, suppressing their natural spawns and harvesting an equivalent stream of EV from the simulated kills. Loot funnels into a chest atop the master stone; an Experience Tome in the chest soaks up the kills' XP. Requires an Awakened Activation Crystal.
ritual.neovitae.torment_nexus.info: Binds every spawner and trial spawner in range, suppressing their natural spawns and harvesting an equivalent stream of EV from the simulated kills. Loot funnels into a chest atop the master stone; an Experience Tome in the chest soaks up the kills' XP. Requires an Awakened Activation Crystal.
ritual.neovitae.upgrade_remove.desc: Wipes every upgrade from worn Sentient Armor and resets used points to zero; no tomes are produced.
ritual.neovitae.upgrade_remove.info: Wipes every upgrade from worn Sentient Armor and resets used points to zero; no tomes are produced.
ritual.neovitae.water.desc: Places water source blocks in the area; with Raw Spiritus, also fills any fluid tank above the master stone (1 Raw per 1,000 mB).
ritual.neovitae.water.info: Places water source blocks in the area; with Raw Spiritus, also fills any fluid tank above the master stone (1 Raw per 1,000 mB).
ritual.neovitae.well_of_suffering.desc: Damages every hostile creature in range and channels their pain into Essentia Vitae at the master stone.
ritual.neovitae.well_of_suffering.info: Damages every hostile creature in range and channels their pain into Essentia Vitae at the master stone.
ritual.neovitae.yawning_void.desc: Erases blocks in a small box directly beneath the master ritual stone, one block per refresh. No drops. Spiritus Invictus moves the block to a placement volume above instead of consuming it; Spiritus Ruina limits consumption to blocks matching items in the chest above; Raw Spiritus accelerates the refresh rate.
ritual.neovitae.yawning_void.info: Erases blocks in a small box directly beneath the master ritual stone, one block per refresh. No drops. Spiritus Invictus moves the block to a placement volume above instead of consuming it; Spiritus Ruina limits consumption to blocks matching items in the chest above; Raw Spiritus accelerates the refresh rate.
ritual.neovitae.yawning_void.spiritus.in: Spiritus Invictus: Moves the cleared block into a 3x3x3 placement volume above the master stone instead of erasing it.
ritual.neovitae.yawning_void.spiritus.ra: Raw Spiritus: Accelerates the refresh rate; with enough raw aura, approaches one block per tick.
ritual.neovitae.yawning_void.spiritus.ru: Spiritus Ruina: Only consumes blocks whose item form matches the whitelist chest directly above the master stone.
ritual.neovitae.zephyr.desc: Persistent wind that gathers loose items and XP, depositing them with the master stone or a nearby player.
ritual.neovitae.zephyr.info: Persistent wind that gathers loose items and XP, depositing them with the master stone or a nearby player.
tooltip.neovitae.anointment.repairing.de: Repairs weapon using XP on hit
tooltip.neovitae.arcane_scribe_tool: Inscribes an alchemy array when used on a surface
tooltip.neovitae.arctool.usage.cutting_f: Used in the Athanor and Tabula Vitae
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.bounce: Bounces entities high into the air. Crouch to disable.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.collection: Pulls dropped items within 2 blocks. Place over a chest to auto-collect.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.day: Advances the time to dawn. Consumed on use.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.deflection: Reflects projectiles passing through a column above the array.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.elevator: Requires another Teleposition Array above or below. Jump to teleport up, sneak to go down. Range: 64 blocks.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.endless_fo: Fills adjacent fluid tanks with up to 6 buckets of water every 5 ticks.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.freeze: Freezes water sources to ice and covers ground in snow. Consumed on use.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.furnace: Smelts items on the ground using furnace recipes. 10 EV per stack. Prevents item despawn.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.growth: Accelerates crop and plant growth in a 2-block radius.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.imprisonme: Place atop a mob spawner. The next mob killed within 11x11x11 becomes the spawner's new mob, and the array is consumed.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.light: Places invisible light sources in a radius above the array.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.loyal_frie: Summons and revives your tamed companions near the array.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.movement: Accelerates entities in the direction the array faces.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.night: Advances the time to night. Consumed on use.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.rain: Toggles rain on or off. Costs 500 EV. Consumed on use.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.repulsion: Pushes hostile mobs away in a 5-block radius.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.signal: Outputs redstone signal 0-15 based on the owner's EV level.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.spike: Damages any entity that steps on the array.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.spirit_sip: Damages non-player mobs and releases raw spiritus into the chunk.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.trigger: Emits a redstone pulse when a mob or player steps on the array.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.undertow: Drives a bubble column through the water above. Right-click to flip between upward (push) and downward (drag).
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.updraft: Launches entities upward with a gust of wind.
tooltip.neovitae.array_effect.vortex: Pulls nearby entities toward the array and stops endermen from teleporting away.
tooltip.neovitae.blood_lantern.desc: Wards a 16-block radius against passive and ambient mob spawns.
tooltip.neovitae.bound_treasures.not_lin: No container linked. Shift right-click a container to bind.
tooltip.neovitae.bound_treasures.unloade: Linked container is in an unloaded area
tooltip.neovitae.crystal_catalyst.desc: Right-click a same-aspect Spiritus Crystal to accelerate its growth, or a fully-grown Raw cluster to transmute it (consumes one Animus Mote)
tooltip.neovitae.diviner.cycleHint: Right-click in air to select a ritual
tooltip.neovitae.enchantment_amplifier: Can act as an Enchanting Table amplifier
tooltip.neovitae.flask.combination: Combination potion - see the Scriptura Vitae for details
tooltip.neovitae.has_living_stats: Theres some kind of notes, but you cant decipher them
tooltip.neovitae.imperfectRitualStone.de: Simple ritual stone for quick effects
tooltip.neovitae.imperfectRitualStone.hi: Place a block above and right-click to activate
tooltip.neovitae.inscriber.desc: The writing is on the wall...
tooltip.neovitae.lexVitae.desc: Sentient multitool: chops, mines, digs, tills. Sneak-right-click to toggle. Sneak+scroll to set mining radius. The Cycle Mode key switches the beam between mining, damage, and both. Mined blocks are sent straight to your inventory.
tooltip.neovitae.lexVitae.rider.raw: All actions empowered by stored Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.masterRitualStone.inver: Inverted - requires redstone signal to operate
tooltip.neovitae.reader.help.1: Right-click a Master Ritual Stone to open the configurator
tooltip.neovitae.reader.help.2: Pick a working area or chest slot, then choose Edit area in world
tooltip.neovitae.reader.help.3: Click two corners to set an area, or one block for a single-block slot
tooltip.neovitae.reader.help.4: Sneak + right-click to cancel an area edit
tooltip.neovitae.rune.acceleration: Reduces ticks between Ara Vitae operations
tooltip.neovitae.rune.blank: A basic rune with no special effect
tooltip.neovitae.rune.capacity_augmented: Multiplicative increase to Ara Vitae EV capacity
tooltip.neovitae.rune.dislocation: Increases fluid transfer rate to/from the Ara Vitae
tooltip.neovitae.rune.efficiency: Reduces EV loss when the Ara Vitae runs out mid-craft
tooltip.neovitae.rune.orb: Increases Orb of Vitae capacity while in the Ara Vitae
tooltip.neovitae.rune.reinforced: Reinforced: double the effect of the base rune
tooltip.neovitae.rune.sacrifice: Increases EV gained from mob sacrifice
tooltip.neovitae.sentientAxe.desc: Empowered by spiritus in your inventory
tooltip.neovitae.sentientAxe.rider.raw: Damage scales with stored Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.sentientPickaxe.desc: Empowered by spiritus in your inventory
tooltip.neovitae.sentientPickaxe.rider.n: Heavy damage when used as a weapon
tooltip.neovitae.sentientPickaxe.rider.r: Mining speed and damage scale with Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.sentientScythe.rider.ra: Sweeping damage scales with stored Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.sentientShovel.desc: Empowered by spiritus in your inventory
tooltip.neovitae.sentientShovel.rider.ni: Heavy damage when used as a weapon
tooltip.neovitae.sentientShovel.rider.ra: Mining speed and damage scale with Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.sentientSword.desc: Empowered by spiritus in your inventory
tooltip.neovitae.sentientSword.rider.nih: Heavy damage scaling; slower attack speed
tooltip.neovitae.sentientSword.rider.raw: Damage scales with stored Raw spiritus
tooltip.neovitae.sentientSword.rider.vin: Faster attacks and bonus movement speed
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.blood_light.desc: Creates a configurable colored light source
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.bound_treasures.d: Stores up to five items inside the sigil. Right-click in air to store the item in your offhand, sneak + right-click to retrieve.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.damned.desc: The blood of the fallen empowers the bearer.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.divination.desc: Reveals the state of an Ara Vitae or your Anima
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.holding.desc: Holds up to 5 sigils - scroll to switch
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.necromancy.desc: Reanimates the bones of fallen mobs into temporary skeletal allies under your command.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.phantom_bridge.de: Creates a phantom bridge beneath you
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.seer.desc: Reveals detailed knowledge of an Ara Vitae or your Anima
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.teleposition.desc: Teleports you to a bound location
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.teleposition.inva: The bound Teleposer's dimension is not loaded.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.teleposition.no_t: The bound location no longer has a Teleposer.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.teleposition.unbo: This sigil is not bound to a Teleposer. Right-click a Teleposer to bind.
tooltip.neovitae.sigil.void.desc: Voids fluids in front of you
tooltip.neovitae.spiritus.rider.invictus: Insufficient Spiritus Invictus to grant Absorption
tooltip.neovitae.spiritus.rider.ruina.in: Insufficient Spiritus Ruina to inflict Wither
tooltip.neovitae.spiritus_gauge: Shows the current spiritus level in the area
